{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Crawling Shade
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Crawling Shade]] [[Path]] was eliminated because it would make [[Lindon]] look too sinister to trust.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
